title: Maximum Number of Vowels in a Substring of Given Length
titleCn: 定长子串中元音的最大数目

testcases.input: s = "abciiidef", k = 3 Output: 3 Explanation: The substring "iii" contains 3 vowel letters.
s = "aeiou", k = 2 Output: 2 Explanation: Any substring of length 2 contains 2 vowels.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: Any substring of length 2 contains 2 vowels.
